verse.name: V1
V2
verse.lines: But I've found a release, my heart is at peace, Since the Word of the hour settled in; With troubles untold, my anchor will hold, To Jesus again and again.

verse.name: C3
V4
V5
verse.lines: But let it crumble and fall, I'm not bothered at all, In the cleft of the Rock I can hide; When it all comes undone, I'm trusting in One, Who gives me His peace down inside.
